name: @pretty-sessions/cli
description: Pretty formatter for AI coding agent sessions (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini)

scripts.test:e2e: mkdir -p ../../.sandbox && cd ../../.sandbox && claude -p "$(cat ../apps/cli/tests/prompts/test-prompt.md)" --print --verbose --dangerously-skip-permissions --output-format stream-json --include-partial-messages | pnpm --filter @pretty-sessions/cli dev claude
